report.summary: Cycle-close v8: Steady-state — TS errors stable at 142, uncommitted files up 818 (from 816 in v7), git locks now Day 10, no new commits or deploys. All 6 API route files healthy locally; 0/6 core routes have rate limiters.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: TypeScript errors stable at 142 — all in structured-data.examples.ts (non-critical reference file), no new regressions
All 6 API route files present and valid: prices, trending, fear-greed, market-dominance, market-metrics, defi-yields
523 published page entries (506 unique) — 17 duplicate entries still pending cleanup
103 published slugs still missing page.tsx files — unchanged from v7, no new missing pages
Live site checks blocked by egress proxy — unable to verify HTTP 200s this cycle (last verified in v7: 5/5 critical OK)
No new page.tsx files created since v7 — no new pages to validate

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 API route files present locally with correct cache headers configured
Cache TTLs verified: prices (swr:120s), trending (swr:600s), fear-greed (swr:1200s), market-dominance (swr:600s), market-metrics (swr:120s), defi-yields (custom CACHE_DURATION)
Production checks blocked by egress proxy — last verified in v7: 4/5 endpoints healthy, /api/market-metrics still 404 in production (exists locally, not deployed)
Rate limiter coverage: 0/6 core data routes — still no rate limiting on prices, trending, fear-greed, market-dominance, market-metrics, defi-yields (carry-over P1)
CoinGecko free tier risk unchanged — no API key configured
524 items remain in PUBLISH_QUEUE awaiting deployment

sections.title: DevOps
items: CRITICAL: Git lock files persist — .git/HEAD.lock (Mar 16) + .git/index.lock (Mar 16) — DAY 10 of blocker
818 uncommitted files (up from 816 in v7 — 2 new files this cycle, likely report files)
Last deployed commit: e999560 (Mar 17) — 'publish: promote 2 pages to production (Day 62)'
Deploy gap: ~8 days since last push — ~170+ locally-built pages not live
No new commits today — all work blocked behind git locks
REQUIRES JEFE ACTION: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push

sections.title: Project Manager
items: SHIPPED THIS CYCLE: No new work landed — monitoring-only cycle
Delta from v7: uncommitted files 816→818 (+2 report files), all other metrics unchanged
CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS: (1) Git locks Day 10, (2) 818 files need commit+deploy, (3) rate limiter gap, (4) 103 missing page.tsx files
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 524 items queued, 2 at top ready (ethereum-layer-2-comparison-guide, onchain-order-book-clob-dex-guide)
RISK: Deploy gap growing — blast radius increases with each cycle. Recommend clearing git locks and batching a deploy ASAP
ATTENTION NEEDED: Git locks are the #1 blocker for all forward progress
